headline: Your next laptop may cost more as PC makers like ASUS and HP brace for price hikes
summary: A global shortage of memory chips is pushing major PC brands like HP, Dell, Acer, and Asus toward potential price increases. The post Your next laptop may cost more as PC makers like ASUS and HP brace for price hikes appeared first on Digital Trends.
